params.name: Data of Fire Salamanders
params.description: The data of the fire salamander comprehensively documents the genetic coding from low-ranking to high-ranking fire salamanders. Their appearance is vibrant red, resembling a burning flame, emitting enchanting radiance. However, accompanying this is the risk of extreme explosiveness, requiring cautious storage.
